title: arthrophyllum diversifolium
intro: Arthrophyllum diversifolium, also known as the New Zealand kiekie, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It is native to New Zealand and is a climbing shrub with large, lobed leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The leaves of the Arthrophyllum diversifolium plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to provide health benefits including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting digestive health.
